name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service enabling users to send and receive funds across 200+ countries via app, online, or in-person at 2,000+ partner locations.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established international money transfer company serving millions of customers worldwide. The platform facilitates the movement of billions in funds annually through a distributed network of partner locations spanning more than 200 countries and territories. The company positions itself as a trusted option for individuals sending money to family abroad, managing cross-border finances, or handling emergency transfers.

MoneyGram offers multiple ways to send money: through a mobile app, online via their website, or in-person at physical partner locations including major banks, national retailers, and local businesses. Recipients have flexible options to receive funds—they can pick up cash at a nearby location, have money deposited directly to a bank account, transferred to a debit card, or sent to a digital wallet. The platform emphasizes a three-step process: creating a profile, choosing a send method, and tracking the transfer in real-time.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive global partner network of 2,000+, competitive exchange rates, multiple send/receive channels, and emphasis on security infrastructure including encryption and fraud protection tools. Customer testimonials highlight speed, ease of use, and exchange rate competitiveness. The service maintains high app ratings (4.9 on App Store with 600K reviews; 4.6 on Google Play with 119K reviews), suggesting established user satisfaction.

However, MoneyGram's website does not display specific fee structures, exchange rate details, transfer speed guarantees, or service limitations. The lack of transparent pricing information is a significant limitation for consumers comparing options. While the company emphasizes security features, no details about regulatory compliance, insurance coverage, or dispute resolution processes are provided on the homepage.
address: 12490 Seal Beach Blvd, Seal Beach, CA 90740

company_info.headquarters: 12490 Seal Beach Blvd, Seal Beach, CA 90740

pros: Access to 2,000+ partner locations across 200+ countries and territories for sending and receiving
Multiple send channels: mobile app, online, and in-person at partner locations
Flexible receive options including cash pickup, bank deposit, debit card, and digital wallet transfers
High customer ratings: 4.9/5 on App Store (600K reviews) and 4.6/5 on Google Play (119K reviews)
Advanced security features including encryption and fraud protection tools
Real-time transfer tracking from initiation to completion
Quick account setup process requiring only a few minutes to create a profile
cons: Website does not display specific transfer fees or cost comparisons, making it difficult to evaluate value
Exchange rates not shown on homepage; users must initiate a transfer to see actual rates offered
No information provided about transfer speed (same-day, next-day, etc.) or delivery time guarantees
Limited details about regulatory compliance, consumer protections, or dispute resolution procedures
No mention of minimum or maximum transfer limits or service restrictions
best_for: Individuals sending money to family and friends in over 200 countries regularly
Users who prefer multiple options for how to send (app, online, or in-person)
Recipients who need flexible ways to access funds (cash, bank account, debit card, or digital wallet)
Consumers who value an established, widely-recognized brand with millions of active users
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers with regular international money transfer needs who value convenience through multiple send/receive channels and an extensive global partner network. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent fee and exchange rate information on their website, requiring users to begin a transaction to understand actual costs—a significant limitation when comparing money transfer options.
services: International money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
In-person cash send at 2,000+ partner locations
Cash pickup for recipients at partner locations
Direct bank account deposit for recipients
User account creation and profile management
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
Security features including encryption and fraud protection
